mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO test_technicist_authorization(technicist_id, product_item_id, granted, operator_id) VALUES
(#{e.technicistId}, #{e.productItemId}, 0, #{e.operatorId})
mapper.select: SELECT pi.check_item_id AS productItemId, pi.check_item_name AS itemName, pt.product_type_id AS productTypeId, pt.product_type_name AS productTypeName FROM test_product_item pi INNER JOIN test_product p ON pi.product_id = p.product_id INNER JOIN test_product_type pt ON p.product_type_id = pt.product_type_id WHERE pi.del_flag = 0 AND pi.check_item_id NOT IN ( SELECT product_item_id FROM test_technicist_authorization WHERE technicist_id = #{technicistId} AND granted = 0 ) ORDER BY pt.product_type_id, pi.check_item_id
